title: ASR Outdoor AMERICAN FLAG Wolf Pocket Knife Folding Blade Patriotic USA 8"
description:
Carry a unique collectible folding knife with the ASR Outdoor Wolf Head Pocket Knife. Featuring a detailed wolf and American flag handle design, this lockback knife combines eye-catching style with everyday functionality. The durable steel blade measures approximately 3 inches long and opens to an overall length of 8 inches, while folding down to a compact 5 inches for convenient storage. An ergonomic handle provides a comfortable grip, and the included decorative wolf-themed gift box makes this knife ideal for collectors, outdoor enthusiasts, hunters, campers and gift giving occasions.

ASR Outdoor Lockback Folding Wolf Pocket Knife, 8 inch
Show off your appreciation for wildlife, the outdoors and patriotic artwork with the ASR Outdoor Wolf Head Collectible Folding Pocket Knife. Designed with a detailed wolf graphic and American flag artwork on the handle, this folding knife makes a distinctive addition to knife collections, display cases and outdoor gear setups.

The knife features a durable steel blade measuring approximately 3 inches in length and utilizes a reliable lockback design to help keep the blade securely open during use. When fully opened, the knife measures approximately 8 inches overall, while the folding design reduces its size to about 5 inches for convenient carrying and storage.

An ergonomic handle promotes a comfortable grip, making this knife suitable for camping, hiking, hunting trips and general outdoor utility tasks. Whether added to a collection or carried on outdoor adventures, this wolf-themed folding pocket knife delivers a combination of functionality, display appeal and patriotic style.
Key Features
  • PATRIOTIC WOLF DESIGN - Features detailed wolf artwork paired with an American flag motif for a distinctive collectible appearance
  • DURABLE STEEL BLADE - Approximately 3-inch steel blade provides dependable cutting performance for outdoor and everyday tasks
  • LOCKBACK MECHANISM - Secure locking design helps keep the blade open during use for added confidence
  • COMPACT FOLDING SIZE - Folds to approximately 5 inches for convenient storage in a pocket, bag or backpack
Specifications
MPN: ASROPKWLF8IN
UPC: 060886496311
Blade Length: 3"
Overall Length: 8"
Closed Length: 5"
Blade Material: Stainless Steel
Intended Use: Collecting, Camping, Hiking, Outdoor Use
The ASR Outdoor Wolf Head Folding Knife combines collectible appeal with practical everyday utility. Featuring a patriotic wolf and American flag handle design, this folding pocket knife is a great choice for knife enthusiasts, collectors and outdoor adventurers.

Constructed with a durable steel blade, the knife measures approximately 8 inches when open and folds to about 5 inches for compact storage. The lockback mechanism helps keep the blade secure during use, while the ergonomic handle offers a comfortable grip.
